meta.title: Canmore Ski Village
meta.description: 15 minutes from Asahikawa Airport—relaxed family skiing and night sessions.

hero.eyebrow: Higashikawa, Kamikawa-gun, Hokkaido · Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park
hero.title:
Canmore
Ski Village
hero.tagline: 15 minutes from Asahikawa Airport—relaxed family skiing and night sessions.

sanctuary.title:
15 minutes from Asahikawa,
a relaxed family hill.
sanctuary.lead: A community-focused hill inside Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park. Eight varied courses across 246 m vertical—easygoing for beginners yet fun for advanced skiers. ¥3,000 by day, ¥500 night skiing from 16:30.
sanctuary.noticeBody: "¥500 night skiing is a steal" and "great with kids, no rush"—local community warmth and quick airport access keep families coming back.
sanctuary.imgAlt: Night-lit slopes in Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park—families skiing at an easy pace

primary.title: Mellow slopes × community feel
primary.lead: Visitors praise "not crowded, great for families" and "friendly staff." Less mega-resort noise, more well-groomed courses and local hospitality—a neighborhood hill within easy reach of Asahikawa.
primary.imgAlt: Slopes in Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park—families skiing at their own pace

secondary.title: One-coin night skiing
secondary.lead: Night sessions from 16:30 are ¥500 all you can ride. Pair with the ¥3,000 day ticket for a full day through evening—popular for after-work runs and families on a budget.

pass.title:
Full day + night,
¥3,500 well spent.
pass.lead: Ski eight courses at your pace by day (adult day ticket ¥3,000), then hit night skiing from 16:30 for just ¥500. Canmore's best value combo—enjoy a full family day for less than half a major resort ticket.
pass.imgAlt: Canmore Ski Village center house—base in Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park

hike.title:
Higashikawa photo town
after skiing.
hike.lead: About 15 minutes by car, Higashikawa is Japan's "photography town"—galleries and cafés line artful streets. Asahiyama Zoo is roughly 30 minutes away, ideal for a family half- or full-day loop.
hike.leadCurry: After skiing, use official spa & stay discounts—pair on-mountain spa lodging with an evening photo walk through Higashikawa.
hike.imgAlt: Higashikawa photography town—art and camera culture

tour.title:
From Asahikawa Airport,
all in one day.
tour.lead: For families—land, ski, optional zoo visit, and night skiing with mostly driving between stops in the Asahikawa area.

sanctuary.title: Complete family hill guide
sanctuary.body: One of the closest ski areas to Asahikawa Airport. Eight courses, 246 m vertical (210–456 m), quad plus pair lifts—resort-level variety with a mellow vibe and ¥3,000 day tickets.

workation.title: Family × night skiing package
workation.body: Sightsee in Asahikawa by day, ¥500 night skiing in the evening. For families with kids—zoo in the afternoon, slopes at night—raising stay value without heavy capital spend.

lake.title: Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park winter concept
lake.body: Bundle skiing, spa, and lodging inside the forest park with Higashikawa photo town and Asahiyama Zoo into a 2-night/3-day family product—beyond the ski hill alone as a regional hub.

access.note: About 15 min by car from Asahikawa Airport · inside Mt. Kitaushi Forest Park · open 9:00–20:30 (night from 16:30)
